title: 3 Pack Premium 7.5" Titanium Super Sharp Sewing Scissors, Office School Home Craft DIY Supplies, Soft Comfort-Grip Scissors for Right/Left Handed Use
features: 【Titanium-Coated Ultra Sharp Blades】Precision-engineered "super sharp sewing scissors" with titanium-coated blades cut through 10+ layers of fabric effortlessly, ensuring clean edges on silk, denim, and leather.
【Ergonomic Comfort Grip Handle】Soft-grip ergonomic handle reduces hand fatigue during prolonged use, perfect for "dressmaking, tailoring, and quilting" projects.
【Heavy Duty & Corrosion-Resistant】Forged from high-carbon stainless steel with titanium coating, these "heavy duty fabric scissors" resist rust and stay sharp 5x longer than regular scissors.
【Multi-Purpose Craft Scissors】Ideal for "sewing, DIY crafts, and upholstery" – cuts threads, fabrics, paper, and vinyl without fraying or snagging.
【Lifetime Sharpness Guarantee】Backed by a 30-year warranty and UK-based support. If your "titanium sewing scissors" ever dull, we replace them FREE!
description: Product Description Product description Product material: stainless steel + PVC handle Product specifications: 19 * 7.5 cm/7.5*2.9inch Color：Yellow,Red,Blue Net weight: 53 g Process: Teflon treatment Features: 1.
